name: Axel Rudi Pell
description: '''Axel Rudi Pell''' (born 27 June 1960) is a German hard rock guitarist. Formerly of the speed metal band [[Steeler (German band)|Steeler]], he has pursued a solo career since the late 1980s–early 1990s with the eponymous band '''Axel Rudi Pell''', working with a number of vocalists; the longest-serving, since 1998, being [[Johnny Gioeli]] of [[Hardline (band)|Hardline]].
